subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory, majesty and splendor befit the dwellers of the Crimson Ark who, in the Qayyúmu'l-Asmá, are named among the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر و ثنا عز و بها سکان سفینه حمرا را لایق و سزاست که در قیوم اسما باسم اهل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
